ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race the candidate is participating in */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the candidate */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the candidate */,
  "candidate_email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "candidate_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "candidate_website" TEXT /* Official website of the candidate */,
  "candidate_photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's photo */,
  "candidate_social_media_platforms" TEXT /* JSON array of social media platforms the candidate is active on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of the race (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the race is taking place */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the race (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  "race_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the race */,
  "race_eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the race */,
  "race_voter_turnout" TEXT /* Expected or actual voter turnout */,
  "race_polling_data" TEXT /* JSON object with polling data and trends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who made the tweet */,
  "tweet_content" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "tweet_date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was posted */,
  "tweet_url" TEXT /* URL to the tweet */,
  "tweet_platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the tweet was posted */,
  "tweet_hashtags" TEXT /* JSON array of hashtags used in the tweet */,
  "tweet_mentions" TEXT /* JSON array of user mentions in the tweet */,
  "tweet_sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score of the tweet */,
  "tweet_engagement_score" TEXT /* Engagement score of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being retweeted */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets of the tweet */,
  "retweet_date" TEXT /* Date the retweets were counted */,
  "retweet_content" TEXT /* Content of the retweets */,
  "retweet_sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score of the retweets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being favorited */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of favorites (likes) of the tweet */,
  "favorite_date" TEXT /* Date the favorites were counted */,
  "favorite_user_ids" TEXT /* JSON array of user IDs who favorited the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "winner" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candidate won the race */,
  "race_index" INTEGER /* Index of the race in the sequence of races */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "result_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate */,
  "result_margin" TEXT /* Margin of victory or loss */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, campaign manager) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile photo */,
  "user_biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "user_permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device type used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
